steps.title: Substitute and solve for x
steps.content:
The first equation gives $y = 9x + 12$. Substitute this expression into the second equation to eliminate $y$:

$$x + 7(9x + 12) = 20$$

Expand and combine like terms:

$$x + 63x + 84 = 20$$

$$64x + 84 = 20$$

$$64x = -64$$

$$x = -1$$

steps.title: Find y by substituting x back
steps.content:
Substitute $x = -1$ into the first equation:

$$y = 9(-1) + 12$$

$$y = -9 + 12$$

$$y = 3$$

The value of $y$ is \$3$.
